name: Crustless Bacon & Egg Quiche
recipeIngredient: 6 slices fat-free turkey bacon, cooked and crumbled
1/4 cup Fleischmann's® Fat Free Spread, liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a food processor, combine milk, baking mix, eggs, spread, and black pepper. Process for 15 seconds.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Sprinkle bacon and cheese on top.
6. Gently press below surface with a fork.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
